description.title: Treat Wheel
description.text: Advanced hiding controls integrated into Hrezygisk.
description.note: Changes take effect on the next app launch.

ignoreMode.title: Ignore Mode
ignoreMode.description: Completely disable all Treat Wheel features.

zygoteMountInfoLeakFixing.title: Zygote Mountinfo Leak Fix
zygoteMountInfoLeakFixing.description: Prevent mount information leaks from zygote.

denylistLogicInversion.title: Denylist Logic Inversion
denylistLogicInversion.description: Invert denylist behavior: denylisted apps get clean namespace.

moduleLoadingTracesHiding.title: Module Loading Traces Hiding
moduleLoadingTracesHiding.description: Hide traces of module library loading.

envSanitization.title: Environment Sanitization
envSanitization.description: Clear LD_PRELOAD, MAGISK_*, and other root-related environment variables from app processes.

metaMountHiding.title: Hide Meta Mounts
metaMountHiding.description: Umount Hrezygisk's own metamodule overlay mounts (source=KSU/APatch) for denylist apps. Only relevant on KernelSU/APatch where metamodule is active.

metamount.title: Meta Mount
metamount.notActive: Metamodule is not active. Install on KernelSU or APatch to enable.
metamount.note: Changes take effect on next reboot. The 'system' partition is excluded by default to prevent bootloops.

enabled.title: Enable Meta Mount
enabled.description: Toggle metamodule mount on/off. When off, modules are not mounted by Hrezygisk.

mountMode.title: Mount Mode
mountMode.description: auto: probe tmpfs/ext4/direct and pick the first that works. tmpfs: stage on /mnt/vendor/<name> (hardest to detect). ext4: loop-mounted ext4 image (mimics old KSU). direct: upperdir on /data (simplest).

fakeName.title: Fake Mount Name
fakeName.description: Custom name for the staging point (/mnt/vendor/<name>). Used by tmpfs and ext4 modes.

allowSystem.title: Allow System Partition (DANGEROUS)
allowSystem.description: Overlay the /system partition. WARNING: This can cause bootloops, black screens, or hot reboots. Only enable if you know what you are doing.

exclusions.title: Module Exclusions
exclusions.description: Choose which modules should NOT be mounted by Hrezygisk's metamodule.
exclusions.note: Excluded modules will not be overlaid by metamount.sh.

language.title: Change language
language.description: Change the language of the WebUI to the selected one.

fullscreen.title: Disable fullscreen mode in WebUI
fullscreen.description: This option will make the WebUI not fill the whole screen.

theme.title: Change WebUI theme
theme.description: Choose your system theme for current WebUI

font.title: Enable system font
font.description: This option will enable system font in current WebUI. NOTE: May not be compatible with FlipFont
